ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the solar panels were installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "maximum_capacity" REAL /* Maximum energy production capacity in kWh */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the location (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., solar panel, inverter) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the equipment is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the equipment manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the energy was produced */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used to produce the energy */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., January, February) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "hour" TEXT /* Hour of the day (e.g., 00, 01, ..., 23) */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Amount of energy produced in kWh */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the location during energy production */,
  "sunlight_intensity" REAL /* Sunlight intensity during energy production */,
  "energy_loss" REAL /* Energy loss during production (e.g., due to inefficiencies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the energy is distributed */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used to distribute the energy */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer receiving the energy */,
  "distribution_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when energy was distributed */,
  "energy_delivered" REAL /* Amount of energy delivered in kWh */,
  "distribution_loss" REAL /* Energy loss during distribution (e.g., due to transmission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_distribution_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "consumer_name" TEXT /* Name of the consumer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the consumer is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the consumer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the consumer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the consumer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the consumer (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., efficiency, uptime) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was measured */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the performance metric was measured */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the performance metric (e.g., %, hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_performance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., production, distribution) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment generating the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
